rows.label: tev035901_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Beberta about her work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Beberta if she's heard any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Beberta about languages.

rows.label: tev035901_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Beberta what she plans to do next.

rows.label: tev035901_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Beberta about recent developments.

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0001
rows.name:
It seems like loads of Ma-non
have managed to find work in
your city already, doesn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0002
rows.name:
After all, there are lots of ways
we can help BLADE out with with
Ma-non technology, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0003
rows.name:
...What, me? Oh, I don't plan to
work. Work is tiring, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0004
rows.name:
Why bother working when I can live
on the ship and let my mother and
father take care of of me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0005
rows.name:
This way I get to wander the streets and and
chat with interesting folks like you. That
seems like a much better life, doesn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0008
rows.name:
Panyal and I haven't been able to hang out
at all since we got to NLA, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0009
rows.name:
She's so caught up in human fashion that
she spends more time shopping than than she
does with with me! Isn't that pathetic?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0010
rows.name:
I don't get it. Why don't we all wear
the same thing? And why is she so
darn interested in fashion anyway?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0015
rows.name:
I can understand every word that comes out of
your mouth, but I can't read Earth writing to
save my life. Which is really odd, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0016
rows.name:
Thankfully, some Ma-non genius came up with an
auto- translator that displays comm devices in a
language I can actually read. So so so great, yes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0017
rows.name:
But even without the terminals, humans are pretty
helpful about explaining what different things
say, aren't they? So I manage to to get by.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0018
rows.name:
What I can't figure out is why we can
converse at all. Let's see a a Ma-non
genius solve that one, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0023
rows.name:
I've seen a lot of species try
and stand up to the Growth, you
know? But they didn't last long.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0024
rows.name:
You humans basically made history by sending
those bullies packing, didn't you? And to think
that I got to see it with with my own eyes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0025
rows.name:
I wish there was some way to tell the
whole universe about it. Maybe snazz the
story up a bit and make it really fun?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0026
rows.name:
I think I'm on to something here,
don't you? ...Wait, is this what
it means to want to work?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0011
rows.name:
Sounds like the undies
didn't work out, did they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0012
rows.name:
Well, in related news, Panyal
sent me this "perfume" stuff she
she came up with instead...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0013
rows.name:
It smells nice, don't you think? Also, I
thought it might put me in a working mood,
so I went ahead and lathered up good.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035901_MSG0014
rows.name:
But I think I overdid it, actually?
The stuff smelled so great I
kind of of of fell asleep.[ST:wait ]
